education.details: Bachelor's in Computer Science and Engineering

summary:
Results-oriented Web Developer skilled in JavaScript, React, and
modern web technologies. Combines proficiency in ethical hacking,
network security, and programming languages including C++, Python,
and Node.js to deliver secure, efficient web solutions. Experienced in UI
design and committed to meeting project deadlines, demonstrated
through successful web development internships and impactful full-
stack projects.

projects.name: Training and Placement
projects.description: A web-based application designed for the effective management of training and placement activities Developed a web-based application for the management of training and placement activities within educational institutions. Provided tools for profile management, job postings, applications, and result tracking

projects.name: Marksheet Ledger
projects.description: An advanced web application for managing student academic records Developed a full-stack project featuring a modern React frontend and Node.js backend. Focused on smart, automated workflows for managing student academic records
